# Security policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest RTLDeck release and the current `main` branch.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do not open a public GitHub issue for a suspected security vulnerability.

Email [jaidenstipp@gmail.com](mailto:jaidenstipp@gmail.com) with the subject `RTLDeck Security Report` and include the affected version and operating system, impact, reproduction steps or a minimal proof of concept, and any known mitigation.

Do not include private HDL, credentials, or unrelated personal data. You should receive an acknowledgment within seven days. Please allow time for investigation and a coordinated fix before public disclosure.
